Ntc And Motion To Compel Pltf To Amend Responses To Deft'S Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AYOOB & PEERY PLUMBING COMPANY, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Amend Responses To Defendant's Form Interrogatories is off calendar. Motion withdrawn by moving party. Judge Curtis A. Karnow. Not reported. (CK/610)

Mtn To Compel Pltf To Answer Depo Questions And Req For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT AYOOB & PEERY PLUMBING COMPANY, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Answer Deposition Questions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to answer the questions at deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff and his counsel in the amount of $1,475, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Set For Trial On May-24-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-07-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504
